sections.paragraph:
and זְבֻל [root זַבַל], m.-

(1) habitation, residence, especially of God. 1Ki 8:13 2Ch 6:2 Psa 49:15 Isa 63:15 Hab 3:11, שֶׁמֶשׁ יָרֵחַ עָמַד זְבֻ֫לָה “the sun (and) moon stand still in their habitation,” i.e. retain their place in the heavens [“i.e. hide themselves, do not shine”]. Compare what has been said under מַזָּלֹות.

(2) [Zebul], pr.n. m. Jud. 9:28 .
